narrative:
Reading 3-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,159 registered voters, with 61.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
